# Archer Balance Reference

## Resource Profile
| Max Stamina | Max Mana | Stam Regen/s | Mana Regen/s |
|-------------|----------|--------------|--------------|
| 40 | 35 | 1.6 | 1.4 |

**Identity:** Balanced hybrid. Uses both resources roughly equally. Many abilities modify bow shots rather than dealing standalone damage. Toggle mechanics and Focus stacking are class-defining.

---

| Equipment | Mana | Stam | CD(s) | AoE | Effect (Base→Upgraded) | Type |
|-----------|------|------|-------|-----|------------------------|------|
| Agility Training | — | — | — | — | +5 phys dmg; Rend 2→3/hit | Passive |

| Piercing Shot | 15 | 15 | 8 | — | +35→55 piercing dmg; pierce 1 enemy | Active |
| Point Blank | — | — | — | — | +15→25 dmg if projectile hits within 5→7 blocks | Passive |
| Posturing | — | — | — | — | Every 4→3s crouched: +3→5 permanent dmg | Passive |
| Quick Trap | 0 | 10 | 8 | 2 rad | 100→150 trap dmg; charges at 300→200 dmg dealt | Offhand |
| Razor Tome | — | — | — | — | Every 3rd BA: Rend 3→5 | Offhand |
| Tailwind | 20→15 | 5 | 20→17 | 6 rad | 2→3 shields/s + Speed 1 in zone [8s] | Active |
| Windcall | 0 | 15 | 10 | 5 cone | Knockback; enemy dmg -10→15 [5→7s] | Active |
| Wind Trap | 10 | 5 | 15 | 5 rad | Slowness 1 AoE [4→6s] | Active |
| Wound | 0 | 0 | 3 tog | — | Toggle: -15 BA dmg → apply Injury 8→12 | Toggle |
| Zone | 0 | 15 | 15 | 8 rad | +20→30 physical dmg while in zone [8s] | Active |

### Common Baselines
- Cost: 0–20 mana, 0–20 stamina
- Cooldown: 3–20s
- Direct damage: 50–180 (often through bow modification)
- Toggle trade-off: -15 BA damage for status application
- Focus: generated by several abilities, scales damage multiplicatively

### Uncommon Baselines
- Cost: 0–35 mana, 0–30 stamina
- Cooldown: 2–20s
- Direct damage: 70–225 (traps), 120–160 (AoE)
- Toggle trade-off maintained: -15 BA for status/Focus gen
- Many passives scale with Focus or status stacks

### Archetype Groups (Uncommon)
- **Focus**: Get Centered, Gambit, Malice, Mana Infusion, Posturing II, Zone II
- **Rend/Injury**: Backstep II, Cauterize, Demoralize, Flash Draw, Mark Target II, Piercing Shot II
- **Frost/Burn**: Bitter Cold, Brand, Crystallize, Frostwalker, Hail Cloak, Shattering Shot
- **Traps**: Bow Trap, Chokehold, Hexing Shot, Prey Seeker, Self-Destruct, Setup, Shard Blast, Spike Trap, Surprise
- **Close-Range**: Blast Step, Grit, Momentum, Reckless Approach, Shoulder Bash

### Rare Baselines
- Many are passives (0-cost) that reward playstyle (close-range, Focus stacking, trap management)
- Active abilities: 15–20 mana, 0–15 stamina, 10–15s CD
- Damage: 85–425 per ability (scaling with stacks/Focus)
- Shields: Passive generation common (2–8 per proc)

---

## Key Balance Patterns

### Cost Economy
- Balanced mana/stamina usage (neither dominates)
- Toggle abilities: 0 resource cost but trade -15 BA damage
- Channel/charge time (1–2s) is an implicit cost
- Focus is generated as a secondary resource, not spent

### Damage Model
- Base bow DPS is constant (35–120 depending on bow tier)
- Abilities ADD to bow DPS or provide burst windows
- Total effective DPS = bow baseline + ability modifications + passive procs
- Close-range bonuses reward risky positioning

### Damage Scaling by Rarity
| Rarity | Per-Ability Burst | Passive Proc | Trap Damage |
|--------|------------------|--------------|-------------|
| Common | 50–180 | 15–25/hit | 50–150 |
| Uncommon | 70–225 | 20–35/hit | 100–225 |
| Rare | 85–425 | 40–150/proc | 175–340 |
| Epic | 200–500 | — | 300–500 |

### Upgrade Patterns
- Damage: +40–50%
- Status stacks: +50%
- Toggle efficiency: same -15 BA trade for better output
- Focus generation: thresholds lowered 25–35%
- Shields: +50%
- Trap recharge: -30% threshold
